raw_text: pablo goi navarro address: avda. alcalde sainz de varanda n2 26, 32 b 50009 zaragoza during academic course 2021: calle evaristo san miguel 13, 4 dcha 28008 madrid +34 630 76 29 38 pgonni@hotmail.com upcoming graduate of aerospace engineering at technical university of madrid (upm). one of the top academic records of his degree with a passion for physics and aircrafts. former chess player, with leadership and self-motivation, keen to work in team and contributing to it. experience in design engineering and manufacturing engineering. education 2017-2021 bsc aerospace engineering at technical university of madrid (upm). field: aircraft and aerospace vehicles. expected graduated date: june 2021 (with upper second-class honours 2:1). main modules: aerodynamics, aeroelasticity and flight mechanics fluid mechanics strength of materials, elasticity and structures aerospace vehicles design engineering thermal fluid mechanics and dynamics mathematics physics work experience february 2021-july 2021 internship in airbus space and defence: working in the department of mechanical design, which oversees the pneumatic, hydraulic and fuel system of military aircrafts. designing aircrafts parts by cad, specifically with catia, and learning know- how of the department. developing the thesis in the company, with the title: design of an auxiliary external tank for an aircraft. october 2020- june 2021 collaboration scholarship in the aerospace manufacturing and production department at technical university of madrid, with the project "analysis of the influence of measurement uncertainty on statistical process control (spc). the main functions to be performed as a scholarship holder are documentary research on the subject, programming of application algorithms in spc, process simulation, and the design of a guide user interface for controlling different processes with matlab. awards 2019 excellence scholarship 2018-2019 in community of madrid for having one of the best academic record in engineering in madrid. 2018 academic record award upm etsiae for having one of the best academic record after the first year of university. (top 3% academic records of promotion). 2017 bronce medal in the xxviii spanish physics contest. 3" place in the xxx aragon chemistry contest. 2016 education and sport excellence prize given by the government of aragon for combining good results in both chess and scholar studies. 2014 excellence in sport and studies award by the government of aragon for combining good results in chess and studies. skills teamwork: former chess team player taking part in high competition tournaments. time management: being able to obtain a good academic record during university combining it with sports practice, and several activities. self-motivation: awarded in the physics spain contest, preparing it on my own and with the willingness of doing it well. leadership: students delegate in college. it skills matlab: intermediate. catia and cad: basic. microsoft applications and excel: intermediate. languages spanish: native english: proficiency german: intermediate extra-curricular experiences participant of the "summer science campus" for young people of institute age, within the project "energy: past, present and future". developing an environmentally friendly conscience. player for a chess team in the 2 spanish league having the opportunity to face professional chess players, taking an important responsibility, and working in team. chess player during more than ten years, obtaining several prizes, and especially developing skills such as playing under pressure, working with different strategies, making decisions in a short time, etc. student leader in college, participating in different activities and helping other students during university years. courses summer 2019 beihang university (beijing): summer scholarship abroad for space physics and optics course. references luis martínez castellan mechanical design engineer airbus eadscasa +34 606 55 64 39 luis.m.martinez@airbus.com
